reviews.comment:
Siempre voy, me es molesto que me piden la credencial del Aca para el descuento en vez del dni. A veces se cuelga la app y no puedo acceder al descuento. Deberían revisarlo.

(Translated by Google)
I always go, but it bothers me that they ask for my ACA membership card for the discount instead of my ID. Sometimes the app crashes and I can't access the discount. They should look into it.
